title: azolla filiculoides subsp. filiculoides
intro: Azolla filiculoides subsp. filiculoides, also known as the duckweed fern or water fern, is a type of free-floating aquatic fern that belongs to the family Azollaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Azolla filiculoides subsp. filiculoides include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Azolla filiculoides subsp. filiculoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and dried powder, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
